zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais於大約1240年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈洛勒斯哈洛勒斯時，她的父親Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais39歲，母親Isabelle de Beaujeu12歲。她於1265年之前與Jean Ier結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais was born about 1240, in Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais, was 39 and her mother, Isabelle de Beaujeu, was 12. She married Jean Ier before 1265. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais est née environ 1240, à Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Beaujeu, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Ier avant 1265. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais um 1240 in Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais 39 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Beaujeu 12. Sie hat vor 1265 Jean Ier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais è nata il circa 1240 nel Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Beaujeu, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Jean Ier prima del 1265. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnaisが約1240年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャーオレスチャーオレスで生まれた時，父Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnaisは39歳，母Isabelle de Beaujeuは12歳であった。1265年以前にJean Ierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 처레스 처레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Beaujeu(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1265년 이전 Jean Ier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Beaujeu, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Ier antes 1265. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais родилась около 1240 г. в местности чароллесь, чароллесь, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Beaujeu, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Ier перед 1265 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Semur-en-Brionnais nació aproximadamente 1240, en Charolles, Charolles, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Beaujeu, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Jean Ier antes de 1265. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
